update.releaseNotes:
v1.0.3 - Changelog
> [!NOTE] > Jacob-Met custom fork (Trackblazer). Based on upstream v5.6.1.
Training & energy reliability --- - **Energy OCR reconciliation** — when Speed failure % implies much lower energy than stored (e.g. 32% failure ≈ 34% energy vs stale 100%), re-read the energy bar or infer energy from failure readings; training failure % is trusted when all tabs agree. - **No rest at full energy after failed training pick** — back out without mood/energy recovery when mood is good and energy is already high. - **Pre-item failure snapshot** — safe fallback and execute blocking use failure % before charm/energy items; low-priority Wit stays excluded. - **Stale training analysis cache** — cache tied to turn day; cleared on turn advance and when backing out of training. - **Training loop fix** — failed execute no longer re-trains forever on the same turn; Finale picks execute without charm; one train per Finale/Summer turn before racing; energy recovery at threshold (≤20%).
Overlay resume & delay calibration --- - **Overlay resume fixes** — persisted session flags restored; home-start guard no longer blocks resume; prefs cleared correctly on stop. - **Delay calibration counter reset** — applying suggested delays (+/− or Approve all) resets fail counters to 0/0 while keeping suggestions.
